description: This sub-concept relates to the flow of movement and the sensory experience. A positive example describes a continuous, uninterrupted interaction, while a negative example describes a jerky, interrupted, or jarring experience.
positive: The gentle flow of water across my skin, *un flusso delicato*, felt utterly seamless.
My foot glided over the smooth stone path, *une glisse continue*, a sustained motion.
The consistent hum of the vibration in my hand, *eine gleichmäßige Schwingung*, was calming.
Respirando profondamente, il movimento del mio petto era *un mouvement fluide*, costante e regolare.
The rhythmic pulsing in my leg, *un latido constante*, felt like a seamless wave.
The upward glide of the elevator, *una salita continua*, was perfectly smooth.
La sensazione del vento sulla mia guancia, *un vent doux*, era un flusso costante e piacevole.
The slow, unbroken rotation of the carousel, *una rotation continue*, was mesmerizing.
The consistent pressure of the warm bathwater, *una presión uniforme*, was deeply relaxing.
A smooth, uninterrupted current of air flowed over my face, *un courant d’air constant*.
The unwavering beat of my heart, *un battito costante*, a continuous rhythm.
The feeling of sinking smoothly into the soft cushions, *un affondamento continuo*, was delightful.
The unwavering warmth radiating from the blanket, *una calidez constante*, enveloped me.
A perpetual, silent drift of the boat on the lake, *una deriva continua*, was remarkably peaceful.
The steady downward motion of the slide, *un descenso continuo*, was exhilarating.
The constant, even pressure of the massage, *une pression constante*, eased my tension.
The uninterrupted flow of the music, *un flux continu*, resonated within me.
The gentle swaying of the hammock, *un balancement continu*, induced a state of calm.
The steady drip of the faucet, *un goutte-à-goutte continu*, was a persistent, yet even, sound.
The gradual increase in the warmth, *un aumento gradual*, felt absolutely seamless.
negative: A jarring vibration pulsed through my arm, *une vibration saccadée*, interrupting the flow.
My foot stumbled on the uneven ground, *un pas haché*, a sudden, disruptive movement.
The erratic buzzing in my ear, *un bourdonnement irrégulier*, was intensely distracting.
The sharp, sudden jerk of the machine *un colpo secco*, interrupted my balance.
The pulsing in my wrist felt disjointed, *un pulsio interrotto*, a series of stutters.
The elevator lurched violently, *un arrêt brusque*, breaking the smooth ascent.
A sudden gust of wind smacked my face, *un coup de vent brutal*, halting the gentle flow.
The carousel stopped abruptly, *un arrêt brutal*, a jarring interruption.
The pressure of the water fluctuated wildly, *une pression irrégulière*, causing discomfort.
A sudden, sharp pain shot through my leg, *una fiammata improvvisa*, disrupting the flow.
The heartbeat skipped a beat, *un battito saltato*, a momentary interruption.
The sinking sensation was jerky and uneven, *un affondamento saccadé*, quite unpleasant.
The heat pulsed intermittently, *un calor intermitente*, a frustrating fluctuation.
A sudden lurch of the boat, *un soubresaut brusque*, threw me off balance.
The slide stopped mid-descent, *un arrêt brusque*, a shocking halt.
The massage felt fragmented and uneven, *un massage discontinu*, rather unpleasant.
The music stuttered and skipped, *un son saccadé*, disrupting the rhythm.
The hammock jerked violently, *un balancement brutal*, making me unsteady.
The faucet sputtered and coughed, *un goutte-à-goutte irrégulier*, a frustrating interruption.
The abrupt change in temperature, *un changement brusque*, was jarring and unpleasant.
